pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that matches your ambitions. Upgrade at your own pace.
pricing.faq_change_plan_q: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing.faq_change_plan_a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. The change takes effect immediately, with prorated billing.
pricing.faq_payment_methods_q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq_payment_methods_a: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal, Orange Money, Wave, MTN Mobile Money and SEPA transfers.
pricing.faq_commitment_a: No, all our plans are commitment-free. You can cancel at any time.
pricing.faq_commission_a: The commission is taken from each successful transaction. The higher your plan, the lower the commission.
pricing.faq_agency_members_q: Does the Agency plan include team members?
pricing.faq_agency_members_a: Yes, the Agency plan allows up to 20 team members with role and permission management.

how_it_works_page.title: How does it work?
how_it_works_page.subtitle: FreelanceHigh connects freelancers, clients and agencies securely.
how_it_works_page.freelance_step1_desc: Sign up, add your skills and portfolio.
how_it_works_page.freelance_step2_desc: Define your packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) with prices and deadlines.
how_it_works_page.freelance_step3_desc: Clients order your services directly or invite you to their projects.
how_it_works_page.freelance_step4_desc: Funds are secured in escrow and released after delivery validation.
how_it_works_page.client_step1_desc: Browse the marketplace or post your project to receive applications.
how_it_works_page.client_step2_desc: Choose a package and place your order. Payment is secure.
how_it_works_page.client_step3_desc: Chat with your freelancer through the built-in messaging.
how_it_works_page.client_step4_desc: Validate the delivery and leave a review. Funds are released.
how_it_works_page.agency_step1_desc: Register your agency with a dedicated profile (logo, description, industry).
how_it_works_page.agency_step2_desc: Invite freelancers to join your agency with custom roles.
how_it_works_page.agency_step3_desc: Assign tasks, track progress and manage client CRM.
how_it_works_page.agency_step4_desc: Centralized finances, configurable internal commission, collective withdrawals.

trust_page.title: Trust & Security
trust_page.subtitle: Your security is our priority. Discover how FreelanceHigh protects every transaction.
trust_page.feature_escrow_desc: All transactions are protected by the escrow system. Funds are held until delivery is validated.
trust_page.feature_kyc_desc: 4 progressive verification levels (email, phone, identity, professional) to ensure reliability.
trust_page.feature_disputes_desc: Our team intervenes in case of a dispute to find a fair solution between the parties.
trust_page.feature_ssl_desc: All communications and data are encrypted with a bank-grade SSL certificate.
trust_page.feature_privacy_desc: Full GDPR compliance. Your personal data is securely stored in Europe.
trust_page.feature_escrow_guaranteed_desc: Funds are never in the hands of a single party. The escrow system protects both buyers and sellers.
trust_page.support_desc: Our support team is available to help you resolve any problem.

affiliation.hero_subtitle: Join our affiliate program and earn commissions on every transaction from your referrals. Simple, transparent and with no earnings limit.
affiliation.how_subtitle: Three simple steps to start earning commissions.
affiliation.step1_desc: Share your unique link with your friends and colleagues
affiliation.step2_desc: Your referrals create an account and start using the platform
affiliation.step3_desc: Receive a commission on every transaction from your referrals
affiliation.tiers_subtitle: The more you refer, the higher your commission rate. Climb the ranks and maximize your earnings.
affiliation.calc_subtitle: Move the sliders to estimate your monthly affiliate earnings.
affiliation.calc_estimate_note: Estimate based on {referrals} referrals with an average revenue of {avgRevenue} €/month and a commission rate of {commission}%.
affiliation.testimonials_subtitle: Discover testimonials from our most active affiliates.
affiliation.testimonial1_quote: Thanks to the program, I earn an extra €500/month. It's an incredible additional income.
affiliation.testimonial2_quote: I recommended FreelanceHigh to my developer colleagues and the commissions come in every month.
affiliation.testimonial3_quote: The affiliate program is transparent and reliable. Payments are always on time.
affiliation.faq1_a: Sign up for the affiliate program, share your unique link and earn a commission on every transaction generated by your referrals. The more you refer, the higher your commission rate.
affiliation.faq2_a: Commissions are paid automatically each month, on the 15th of the following month. You can choose to receive your earnings by SEPA transfer, PayPal, Wise or Mobile Money.
affiliation.faq3_a: The minimum withdrawal is €10. Once your balance reaches this threshold, you can request a transfer at any time or wait for the automatic monthly payment.
affiliation.faq4_a: Absolutely! You can refer freelancers, clients and agencies. Commissions on agency referrals are particularly attractive because their transaction volumes are higher.
affiliation.faq5_q: How do I track my referrals?
affiliation.faq5_a: You have a complete dashboard with the number of referrals, commissions earned, payment history and detailed statistics on your performance.
affiliation.cta_subtitle: Start earning commissions today. Free sign-up, monthly payments, no earnings limit.

help.hero_subtitle: Find answers to your questions, explore our guides or contact our support team.
help.article_create_account: How to create a FreelanceHigh account
help.article_publish_service: Publish your first service in 5 minutes
help.article_withdraw: How to withdraw your earnings (SEPA, Mobile Money)
help.article_dispute: What to do in case of a dispute with a client
help.article_track_orders: Track the progress of your orders
help.article_optimize_profile: Optimize your profile to attract more clients
help.faq_signup_q: How do I sign up on FreelanceHigh?
help.faq_signup_a: Signing up is free and takes just a few minutes. Go to the sign-up page, choose your role (Freelancer, Client or Agency), fill in your information and verify your email address via the OTP code we send you. You can also sign up with Google, LinkedIn, Facebook or Apple.
help.faq_payment_methods_a: FreelanceHigh accepts credit cards (Visa, Mastercard) via Stripe, Mobile Money payments (Orange Money, Wave, MTN MoMo) via CinetPay, PayPal, SEPA transfers, and stablecoins USDC/USDT. The default currency is Euro (EUR) with automatic conversion to FCFA, USD, GBP and MAD.
help.faq_delivery_a: Once the order is accepted, the freelancer works on the project and delivers files directly in the order space. The client receives a notification and has time to validate the delivery or request a revision. Funds are only released after validation.
help.faq_open_dispute_q: How do I open a dispute?
help.faq_open_dispute_a: If you are not satisfied with a delivery and cannot reach an agreement with the provider, you can open a dispute from the order detail page. A FreelanceHigh mediator will review the evidence provided by both parties and render a fair verdict.
help.faq_commissions_a: Commissions vary by subscription plan: Free (20%), Pro at 15 EUR/month (15%), Business at 45 EUR/month (10%), Agency at 99 EUR/month (8%). Each plan offers additional benefits such as advertising boosts, AI certifications and API keys.
help.faq_withdraw_q: How do I withdraw my earnings?
help.faq_withdraw_a: Go to the Earnings & Finances section of your dashboard. You can withdraw your funds via SEPA transfer (Europe), Mobile Money via Orange Money, Wave or MTN MoMo (Africa), PayPal, Wise, or crypto (USDC/USDT). Processing time varies from 1 to 5 business days depending on the method chosen.
help.faq_cancel_order_q: Can I cancel an order in progress?
help.faq_cancel_order_a: Yes, under certain conditions. If the freelancer hasn't started the work yet, cancellation is automatic with a full refund. If work is in progress, a cancellation request is submitted and both parties must reach an agreement. In case of disagreement, a dispute can be opened.
help.faq_2fa_q: How do I enable two-factor authentication (2FA)?
help.faq_2fa_a: Go to Settings > Security in your dashboard. Enable 2FA and choose between Google Authenticator (TOTP app) or SMS code. Scan the QR code with your authentication app or enter your phone number. Confirm with the verification code.
help.faq_agency_q: How does the agency system work?
help.faq_agency_a: Agencies have a dedicated space to manage a team of freelancers. As an agency, you can invite members, publish services under your brand, manage multi-member projects with Kanban view, and centralize billing. The Agency plan (99 EUR/month) allows up to 20 members and offers 50 GB of shared storage.
help.faq_contact_support_q: How do I contact FreelanceHigh support?
help.faq_contact_support_a: You can contact us in several ways: via live chat available on this page (Monday to Friday, 9am-6pm CET), by email at support@freelancehigh.com, or by creating a support ticket from the form below. Our team commits to responding within 24 hours.
help.faq_kyc_q: What is KYC and why is it necessary?
help.faq_kyc_a: KYC (Know Your Customer) is a mandatory identity verification process for certain actions. Level 1 (email) gives basic access. Level 2 (phone) allows ordering and applying. Level 3 (identity document) unlocks withdrawals and service publishing. Level 4 (professional verification) gives access to the Elite badge and higher limits.
help.faq_boost_q: How do I boost the visibility of my services?
help.faq_boost_a: Several strategies are available: complete your profile to 100%, get positive reviews, use relevant keywords in your titles and descriptions, add quality images to your services, and use the advertising boosts included in Pro, Business and Agency plans to appear at the top of search results.
help.support_desc: Create a support ticket and our team will respond within 24 hours. You can also contact us by email at
help.ticket_error_required: Please fill in all required fields.
help.ticket_success: Your ticket has been created successfully. We will respond within 24h.
help.chat_welcome: Hello! How can I help you?
help.chat_auto_reply: Thank you for your message. A member of our team will respond as soon as possible. In the meantime, check our FAQ above for a quick answer.
help.cat_instructors_desc: Become an instructor and manage your courses
help.article_enroll_formation: How to enroll in a course
help.article_become_instructor: How to become an instructor on FreelanceHigh
help.article_get_certificate: How to get your completion certificate
help.article_promo_codes: Using a promo code on a course
help.faq_enroll_formation_q: How do I enroll in a course?
help.faq_enroll_formation_a: Go to the course page that interests you and click 'Enroll' or 'Buy'. For paid courses, proceed with payment by credit card or Mobile Money. You will have immediate access to all content. For free courses, enrollment is instant after logging into your account.
help.faq_formation_access_duration_q: How long do I have access to a purchased course?
help.faq_formation_access_duration_a: Access to a purchased course is unlimited as long as the platform is in service. You can review the content as many times as you wish. If the instructor removes their course, you retain access for a minimum of 12 additional months.
help.faq_formation_refund_q: Can I get a refund for a course?
help.faq_formation_refund_a: Yes, courses come with a 30-day money-back guarantee, provided you have viewed less than 30% of the content. Contact support to make your request. Downloaded digital products are non-refundable. Cohort enrollments can be canceled up to 7 days before the start date.
help.faq_what_is_cohort_a: A cohort is a course session with defined start and end dates, limited seats, and structured support from the instructor. Unlike a self-paced course, a cohort offers a collective learning framework with personalized follow-up.
help.faq_complete_formation_q: How do I complete a course and get my certificate?
help.faq_complete_formation_a: To complete a course, you must finish 100% of the lessons and, if the course includes quizzes, achieve the minimum required score. Your progress is saved automatically. Once all conditions are met, your completion certificate is automatically generated and accessible from your learner space.
help.faq_promo_code_q: How do I use a promo code on a course?
help.faq_promo_code_a: When purchasing a course, enter your promo code in the designated field on the payment page and click 'Apply'. The discount will be applied immediately to the total amount. Promo codes have expiration dates and may be limited in number of uses.
help.faq_formation_mobile_q: Can I take a course on mobile?
help.faq_formation_mobile_a: Yes, the FreelanceHigh platform is fully responsive and optimized for mobile devices. You can take courses, watch videos, answer quizzes and download resources from your smartphone or tablet. Your progress is synced across all your devices.
help.faq_become_instructor_q: How do I become an instructor on FreelanceHigh?
help.faq_become_instructor_a: Go to the 'Become an instructor' page and fill in the application form (5 minutes). Indicate your areas of expertise, write your professional biography and add your links (LinkedIn, website, YouTube). Our team reviews your application within 48 hours and contacts you by email.
help.faq_instructor_revenue_a: Instructors receive 70% of the net sale price for each paid enrollment and each digital product sale. FreelanceHigh retains 30% for platform, hosting and payment fees. Revenue is calculated monthly and paid to your wallet within 30 days. You can then withdraw your funds via SEPA transfer, Mobile Money, PayPal or Wise.
help.faq_instructor_approval_q: How long does it take for my instructor application to be approved?
help.faq_instructor_approval_a: Our team reviews applications within 48 business hours. You will receive a confirmation email as soon as your application is approved. In case of rejection, we will communicate the reasons and possible improvements for resubmitting.
help.faq_create_publish_formation_q: How do I create and publish a course?
help.faq_create_publish_formation_a: Once approved as an instructor, access your instructor space and click 'Create a course'. A 4-step wizard guides you: general information, program and content, pricing, then publication. Each course is subject to moderation before being publicly visible.
help.faq_get_certificate_q: How do I get my completion certificate?
help.faq_get_certificate_a: The certificate is automatically generated when you have completed 100% of the course content and achieved the minimum quiz score (if applicable). You will find it in the 'My Certificates' section of your learner space. You can download it as a PDF and share it via a unique link with QR code.
help.faq_certificate_value_q: What is the value of a FreelanceHigh certificate?
help.faq_certificate_value_a: FreelanceHigh certificates attest to the completion of a training course on our platform. They have an informative value and demonstrate your acquired skills. They do not constitute a state diploma or official professional certification, but are verifiable by employers and recruiters through our verification page.
help.faq_verify_certificate_q: How do I verify the authenticity of a certificate?
help.faq_verify_certificate_a: Each certificate has a unique identifier and QR code. Employers and recruiters can scan the QR code or enter the identifier on our public verification page to confirm the certificate's authenticity, the holder's name, the course concerned and the date of completion.
help.faq_what_is_digital_product_q: What is a digital product on FreelanceHigh?
help.faq_what_is_digital_product_a: A digital product is a downloadable file or set of files created by an instructor: e-books, templates (design, code, documents), graphic resources, audio files, video or software licenses. They are available for purchase on the Courses section of the platform.
help.faq_buy_digital_product_q: How do I buy a digital product?
help.faq_buy_digital_product_a: Go to the product page, click 'Buy' and proceed with payment. Once payment is confirmed, the product is immediately available for download from your learner space. Some products offer a free preview before purchase.
help.faq_return_digital_product_q: Can I return a digital product?
help.faq_return_digital_product_a: No, digital products are non-refundable once downloaded, in accordance with consumer law. Before purchasing, we encourage you to review the detailed description and product preview when available.
help.faq_ai_search_q: How does AI search work on FreelanceHigh?
help.faq_ai_search_a: AI search uses natural language processing to understand your needs. Simply describe what you're looking for in everyday language (for example: 'I want to learn web development from scratch') and our engine will suggest the most relevant courses, services and freelancers.

instructor_landing.hero_subtitle: Join hundreds of instructors who share their knowledge and generate passive income on FreelanceHigh.
instructor_landing.benefit_revenue_desc: Keep 70% of every course sale. Guaranteed monthly payments.
instructor_landing.benefit_audience_desc: Reach thousands of learners in francophone Africa and worldwide.
instructor_landing.benefit_passive_desc: Create once, sell forever. Your courses work for you 24/7.
instructor_landing.benefit_tools_desc: Course builder, advanced analytics, learner and payment management.
instructor_landing.feature_builder_desc: 4-step wizard, video import, interactive quizzes, downloadable resources and modular structure.
instructor_landing.feature_analytics_desc: Track your revenue, learner count, completion rates and reviews in real time.
instructor_landing.feature_payments_desc: Stripe + Mobile Money (Orange, Wave, MTN). Monthly withdrawals via SEPA, PayPal or Wise.
instructor_landing.step_1_desc: Fill out the application form and tell us about your expertise.
instructor_landing.step_2_desc: Our team reviews your application and contacts you by email.
instructor_landing.step_3_desc: Publish your courses and start generating income.
instructor_landing.testimonial_1_text: I created 3 digital marketing courses. In 6 months, my income exceeded my previous salary.
instructor_landing.testimonial_2_text: The platform gave me access to an African and international audience I could never have reached alone.
instructor_landing.testimonial_3_text: Becoming an instructor on FreelanceHigh was the best professional decision of my life.
instructor_landing.faq_1_a: You receive 70% of the net sale price. Revenue is calculated monthly and paid to your wallet within 30 days. You can withdraw via SEPA, Mobile Money, PayPal or Wise.
instructor_landing.faq_2_q: What type of content can I create?
instructor_landing.faq_2_a: Video courses, written courses, interactive quizzes, downloadable resources, guided cohorts and digital products (e-books, templates, source code, licenses).
instructor_landing.faq_3_a: Our team reviews applications within 48 business hours. You will receive a confirmation email or feedback with improvement suggestions.
instructor_landing.faq_4_q: Do I have to pay to become an instructor?
instructor_landing.faq_4_a: No, the application and approval are completely free. We only charge our 30% commission on your actual sales.
instructor_landing.faq_5_q: Can I withdraw my courses at any time?
instructor_landing.faq_5_a: Yes, you can withdraw or pause your courses whenever you want. Already enrolled learners retain access for a minimum of 12 months.
instructor_landing.faq_6_a: Your courses appear in the marketplace, search results and recommendations. FreelanceHigh also promotes courses through its marketing channels (newsletter, social media).
instructor_landing.faq_7_a: Yes, each course is reviewed before publication to ensure quality. You receive feedback within 48h with approval or modification requests.
instructor_landing.faq_8_q: Can I sell courses in French?
instructor_landing.faq_8_a: Absolutely! The platform is bilingual (FR/EN). You can publish your courses in French, English or both to maximize your audience.
instructor_landing.cta_subtitle: Join hundreds of instructors and start generating passive income today.
instructor_landing.cta_perks: Free approval · No hidden fees · Monthly payments
